summary: Reviewed the inbox runner and paired delegate together as an end-to-end readonly smoke path. Verdict: needs_revision. The wrapper is well-aligned with the governed best-effort/read-only review contract and adds strong evidence gating, but the delegate has a material bug: OCR-only successful extraction can still be marked failed because status is derived from the presence of any OCR error even when text was extracted. This undermines truthful end-to-end outcomes for the wrapper/delegate pair.
